clip_info.annotation_instructions: Add temporal queries below. Each query should have a unique query_id.

annotations.question: When does one of the graspers first detach itself from the gallbladder?
annotations.notes: Optional: Add notes about this annotation

annotations.question: what is the longest time during which one of the graspers grasps the gallbladder and during which frames?
annotations.answer_format: Timesteps X-Y (or multiple ranges: X-Y, A-B)
annotations.notes: Use multiple ranges if action happens multiple times
